title: tephrosia boivinii
intro: Tephrosia boivinii, also known as the Boivin's Horsefly Tree, is a species of plant in the pea family that is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia boivinii include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Tephrosia boivinii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
